Entries.UsedFor: Confirming OAuth2 / OIDC as the primary authentication model, token endpoint URL, access token expiry (3600s), and Authorization Code flow as primary grant type
Entries.Excerpt: GrowthZone acts as an OpenID Connect (OIDC) Provider built on OAuth 2.0. Token Endpoint: https://growthzoneapp.com/oauth/token. Access token expires_in: 3600 seconds.

Entries.UsedFor: Token endpoint URL for OAuth2 Configuration.Auth.tokenEndpoint
OAuth2 Bearer token auth header pattern
Entries.Excerpt: JWT Bearer token used in Authorization header. Access token format is JWT.

Entries.UsedFor: API key documented as an alternative auth mechanism (deprecated-not-used per task scope); also source of OData $skip/$top pagination parameters
Entries.Excerpt: API overview mentions $skip and $top OData-style pagination parameters for contacts and memberships endpoints.

Entries.UsedFor: Confirming /api/contacts/delta endpoint for incremental sync with ModifiedDate watermark field
Entries.Excerpt: GET /api/contacts/delta — delta endpoint for contacts with modified datetime UTC parameter. Returns ContactId, DisplayName, ModifiedDate, IsDeleted, SystemContactTypeId.

Entries.UsedFor: Confirming IsDeleted soft-delete flag on /api/contacts/delta response — DeleteSemantics.model=soft
Entries.Excerpt: The delta endpoint returns IsDeleted=true for contacts deleted since last sync. This confirms soft-delete semantics for the Contact family.

Entries.UsedFor: Confirming webhooks are available in GrowthZone (WebhooksAvailable=true)
Entries.Excerpt: WebHookSetup.html documents 8 operations for webhook CRUD, test webhook, and action type lookups. Webhook subscriptions are configurable via /api/webhook endpoints.

Entries.UsedFor: Confirming full CRUD write capability on Contact, Person, Organization objects
Entries.Excerpt: dev-Contacts.html documents 188 operations including POST/PUT/DELETE operations for contacts. Full CRUD surface confirmed.
Access Token expires_in: 3600 seconds. Token endpoint: https://growthzoneapp.com/oauth/token.

Entries.UsedFor: Confirming default page size of 500 for paginated endpoints
Entries.Excerpt: CuratedApi documents /api/memberships/all with $top/$skip pagination. Rate limit guidance of ~2s recommended per integration.growthzone.com/api/. BatchMaxRequestCount=30 set conservatively.

Entries.UsedFor: Rate limit guidance for BatchRequestWaitTime (~2s window per API overview docs)
Entries.Excerpt: API overview page describes sample API calls and usage patterns. No explicit rate limit count documented; ~2s window guidance referenced in task specification.

Entries.UsedFor: Confirming ContactId as the universal PK for Contact-family objects; universalPK hint
Entries.Excerpt: All contact endpoints use ContactId as the primary identifier: /api/contacts/person/{contactId}, /api/contacts/OrgGeneral/{ContactId}, /api/contacts/{contactId}/NotesAndFields, etc.

Entries.UsedFor: Confirming custom fields returned in Fields[] array from NotesAndFields endpoint — CustomFieldMarkerPattern
Entries.Excerpt: GET /api/contacts/{contactId}/NotesAndFields returns a Fields[] array. Each element has CustomFieldId, Name, DisplayName, CustomFieldType, Value, FieldGroupName, IsPublic, IsArchived.

Entries.UsedFor: AuthFlow classification as oauth2-authcode based on documented Authorization Code flow
Entries.Excerpt: Recommended flow: Authorization Code (response_type=code). Step-by-step example shows authorization endpoint then token exchange with code. GrowthZone acts as OIDC Provider.
